message: Fix critical issues in wish, lipgloss, glamour, and huh; improve test coverage

files.patch:
@@ -75,6 +75,7 @@ regex = "1.11"
 once_cell = "1.19"
 bitflags = "2"
 lru = "0.12"
+chrono = "0.4"
 
 # CLI (for glow binary)
 clap = { version = "4.5", features = ["derive", "env"] }

@@ -12,6 +12,7 @@ lipgloss = { path = "../lipgloss" }
 thiserror.workspace = true
 tracing = "0.1"
 tracing-subscriber = "0.3"
+chrono = { workspace = true }
 
 [lints]
 workspace = true
